title: Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions8.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 8:
Togorian Trap'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[April]] [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=76 |isbn=0590129929 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap''''' is the eighth adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[April]] [[1998]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''You are a bounty hunter. The Galactic Empire has sent you to Togoria to trap the Rebels Han Solo, Princess Leia, and Luke Skywalker. To find them, you must travel through the wilds of Togoria, where fierce creatures stalk their prey. A great reward awaits you – if you can survive. Your mission: to ensnare the Rebels and bring glory to the Empire.'' ''Good luck.'' ==Plot summary== As the [[Punishing One/Legends|''Punishing One'']] enters the [[Thanos system]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], disables it, rendering it useless. The occupants, [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], [[Udin]], and [[Eron Stonefield]], planned to capture Solo and claim the large bounty on his head, but find themselves outsmarted. Forced to abandon the ''Punishing One'', they use an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] to reach [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]. The ''Falcon'' approaches the city of [[Caross]] with its passengers: [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. The [[Margrave-sister]], [[Ffaseer effet Ihsss]], meets with Leia, and invites her and her companions to a royal reception. Meanwhile, the bounty hunters land on Togoria, bruised and shaken. While tracking through the forest, the bounty hunters are set upon by [[Fassool]]'s hunting band, who agree to help him find and capture Solo. One of the bounty hunters joins Fassool's band, and makes their way to Caross. Upon reaching Caross, the hunter subdues Solo's allies, and grabs [[Grubba Desilijic Aarrpo|Grubba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Solo gets the upper hand for a short while, but Grubba saves the hunter. The Rebels are then taken to the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Valiant (Victory-class)|''Valiant'']]. The ''Valiant'', however, has been overrun by Rebel forces. The bounty hunters unwittingly deliver the Rebels into the hands of other Rebels masquerading as Imperials, collecting counterfeit credits. Grubba is returned to Jabba, but the Hutt crimelord is displeased with the fact that bounty on Solo's head was not claimed. ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
